meta.title: Experiences at Farm El Baya - Movement, Harvests, Slow Days
meta.description: Included farm access, movement and stargazing, plus bookable training, beekeeping, harvests, cooking, and a private Testour-Dougga tour.

hero: There is always something to do. And always permission to do nothing.
included: Walk the trails. Sit under the olive trees. Watch the animals. The land is yours to explore.
An indoor and outdoor space for yoga, calisthenics, and movement - bars, rings, and open ground for a farm gym session, a run, or parkour.
One of the farm's best-kept secrets. The rooftop at night, far from city light.
Feed the chickens. Walk with the donkey. Spend time with the horse. The animals are daily life here.
seasonal: Pomegranates, figs, almonds - depending on the season, there is always something to pick.
eventsSubhead: Time your stay around the region's festivals and Roman heritage - all within a short drive.
events: Classical theatre and music in the Roman amphitheatre at Dougga, a UNESCO World Heritage site nearby.
The town's famous autumn celebration of its pomegranate harvest, 15 minutes away.
Live jazz in the region each spring.
One of North Africa's best-preserved Roman cities - temples, theatre, and mosaics, 20-40 minutes away.
Andalusian heritage, a historic mosque, and a weekly market, 15 minutes away.
